title: CoordsSaver
description:
More vanilla feeling version of homes
with CoordsSaver you can save your current coordinates with a name in a list, and retrieve the list and coordinates at a later date, stopping you from having to use screenshots to save your base location!
body:
More vanilla feeling version of homes with CoordsSaver you can save your current coordinates with a name in a list, and retrieve the list and coordinates at a later date, stopping you from having to use screenshots to save your base location!

CoordsSaver is pretty simple, with only two command and permissions, all data is saved in a SQLite database

/savecoords (name)
/listcoords

Permissions
coords.list (/listcoords)
save.coords (/savecoords)
